providers/evidence-gcs: GCS-backed WORM evidence Store behind control-plane/evidence.Store (hexagonal: objectIO port confines cloud.google.com/go/storage v1.62.3, exported fakes -> credential-free conformance running the REAL Sink + VerifyChain; build-tagged integration). No interface change (evidence.New already takes a Store). Seq->object with DoesNotExist no-overwrite + predecessor no-gap + CRC32C both directions; int64-UnixNano codec preserves chainHash. deploy/gcp/modules/evidence: hardened bucket + retention policy + least-priv create/get/list role (no delete; GCS overwrite needs objects.delete) bound at bucket scope; root-wired + bootstrap storage.admin for APPLY; authored-not-applied. WORM stated at two trust levels (append-identity by IAM; privileged actor by retention LOCK, is_locked default off = tamper-evident not tamper-resistant). pre-pr-review 3-lens: reconciled the WORM over-claim into the two-trust-levels framing (verified GCS overwrite needs objects.delete); bumped x/net 0.53->0.55 for GO-2026-5026. gofmt/vet/build/test-race/golangci(0)/govulncheck(clean)/terraform-validate/coverage(54%) all green.
